memories.value: First run. Discover available incidents and sre_alerts data. Establish baseline uptime metrics and status page state.
No patterns learned yet. Will populate as incidents and SLA trends are detected.
No SLA data yet. Will begin tracking 30-day, 90-day, and calendar year uptime on first incident data ingestion.
No incident history yet. Will record resolved incidents and postmortem summaries for pattern detection.
